creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello Sergey, 

this is not a compatibility issue, you just need to tune the emulation layer. 
It can work in 2.4.X and in 4.6.X mode.  You can choose the desired mode via 
the compat.linux.osrelease sysctl.  You have to set it to 2.6.16 and it will 
work.  The officially supported Fedora port works in the same way. 
If you need further info on sysctls, you can read the related chapter of 
FreeBSD Handbook: 
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/configtuning-sysctl.html 

Regards, 
Gabor Kovesdan
